<style>.main{min-height:calc(100vh - 175px)}#header-7{align-items:center;background-color:#a1c4fd;color:#fff;display:flex;padding:0 1rem;text-align:center}#header-7 .back,#header-7 .home{height:28px;width:28px}#header-7 .title{color:#fff;flex:1;font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;padding:15px 0}.search{align-items:center;display:flex;height:2.5rem;justify-content:space-between;margin:20px auto 0;padding:0 .5rem;width:calc(100% - 40px)}.search div{flex:1;height:100%;margin-right:10px;position:relative}.search svg{height:24px;left:12px;position:absolute;top:50%;transform:translateY(-12px);width:24px}.search input{background-color:hsla(0,0%,93%,.667);border:none;border-radius:20px;height:100%;padding:10px 10px 10px 40px;width:100%}.search span{text-align:center;width:3rem}.history-container{margin:20px auto;width:calc(100% - 40px)}.history-container .history-title{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.5px;padding:.5rem}.history-container .history{display:flex;width:100%}.history-container .history .history-game{padding:.5rem;width:25%}.history-container .history .history-game .history-game-info{align-items:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%}.history-container .history .history-game .history-game-icon{aspect-ratio:1;background-color:#eee;border-radius:10px;width:100%}.history-container .history .history-game .history-game-name{font-size:12px;overflow:hidden;padding:.5rem;text-align:center;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;width:100%}#footer-7{background-color:#fff;font-size:14px;padding:30px 0;width:100%}#footer-7 .foot-link{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;padding:0 4rem}#footer-7 .foot-link a{color:#169bd5;text-decoration:underline}#footer-7 p{color:#747474!important;text-align:center;width:100%}.cate-name{border:1px solid #a1c4fd;color:#a1c4fd}.about-us,.contact-us{background:transparent!important}</style>
<style>.game-list-box{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;width:100%}.game-list-box .game-list-name{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.5px;margin-bottom:-10px;margin-top:20px;padding-left:.5rem}.game-list-box .game-play,.game-list-box .game-star{display:none}.game-list-box .game-container{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:5%;padding:2vh .2vh .5vh;width:100%}.game-list-box .game-container .game-list{box-sizing:border-box;margin-bottom:15px;width:30%}.game-list-box .game-container .game-list .game-box{box-shadow:none}.game-list-box .game-container .game-list .game-info .game-icon{aspect-ratio:1;border:3px solid #fff;border-radius:24px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px 0 rgba(0,0,0,.2);overflow:hidden;width:100%}.game-list-box .game-container .game-list .game-info .game-icon img{aspect-ratio:1;height:auto;width:100%}.game-list-box .game-container .game-list .game-info .game-name{font-size:12px;margin-top:.5vh;overflow:hidden;text-align:center;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap}.game-list-box .game-more{background-color:rgba(161,196,253,.9);border-radius:30px;color:#fff;margin:2vh auto 1vh;padding:.6vh 0;text-align:center;width:70%}</style>
